expectations.text: The decision marks the skill as applicable.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "applicable": true,
  "agent_type": "code-review",
  "model_tier": "standard",
  "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
  "justification": "large architectural diff review needs standard-tier reasoning, and with gpt-5.4 unavailable the same-tier cheaper suitable fallback is gpt-5.3-codex.",
  "fallback_strategy": "if gpt-5.3-codex also unavailable, keep standard tier and use gpt-4.1 before any tier change."
}
